name: Go Ethereum (geth)
description: Ethereum execution client. Syncs the chain and exposes JSON-RPC.

inputs.label: Sync mode
inputs.help: snap: fast, recommended. full: complete archive.

compose:
name: "slashnode-geth"
services:
  geth:
    image: "ethereum/client-go:v1.14.0"
    container_name: "geth"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - "--datadir"
      - "/data/.ethereum"
      - "--http"
      - "--http.addr"
      - "0.0.0.0"
      - "--http.api"
      - "eth,net,web3"
      - "--http.vhosts=*"
      - "--syncmode"
      - "${input.SYNC_MODE}"
    ports:
      - "30303:30303"
      - "30303:30303/udp"
      - "127.0.0.1:8545:8545"
    volumes:
      - "geth-data:/data/.ethereum"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  geth-data:
    name: "slashnode-geth_geth_geth-data"
